sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93791" key="shmale/os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σημᾰλέος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">σῆμα</etym>) <sense id="n93791.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">giving a sign</tr_>, epith. of Zeus, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">who sends signs by thunder</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:32:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.32.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
